title: Atractocarpus benthamianus
taxonomy: Atractocarpus benthamianus is classified within the family Rubiaceae, commonly known as the coffee or madder family. This family consists of flowering plants with about 13,900 known species. Atractocarpus benthamianus is a species of flowering plant native to Australia. The classification of Atractocarpus benthamianus helps in understanding its evolutionary relationships with other plants within the Rubiaceae family.
